title: Wine red Satin Ribbon for Gift Wrapping Ribbon, 2 Rolls 15mm x 22M for Crafting Flower Bouquets Presents Balloon Valentines Gifts DIY Craft Hair Bows Making Cake Wedding Decorations Ribbons
features: 🎀【Exquisite Material】Wine red ribbon is made of high quality polyester satin fabric with clean edges and reusable, bright colors, bright surface, comfortable touch, no wrinkles, luxurious hand feeling and good texture.

🎀【Easy to Use】The aribbons for gift wrapping are long enough to be 22 meters long and 15 mm wide. Simply cut it to the desiwine red length with scissors. Ribbons for crafting can be applied to various projects. The color is long-lasting, does not fade, and can be used directly.

🎀【Multi-scene Application】Used as gift wrapping ribbons, bow making ribbons, bridal bouquets ribbons, crafts ribbons, gift baskets ribbons, gift boxes ribbons, hair accessories ribbons, dresses, invitations, cakes, sweets, cookies, etc.
🎀【Ideal Decoration】Suitable for all kinds of decorations, Valentine's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, party decorations, table decorations, etc.

🎀【Satisfactory Customer Service】We are committed to providing you with a satisfactory shopping experience. If you encounter any problems or have suggestions when using our satin ribbon, please contact us in time and we will provide you with a satisfactory solution.
